Common Questions

What is the minimum volume for enterprise orders?
Minimum order volume depends on the industrial line. Typically, stationery starts at 500 units, while luxury packaging starts at 100–200.
Can I upload my own artwork?
Yes. Once you initialize an inquiry, our technical team will request your high-res PDF or AI vector files for colour calibration.
